text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bourbon, I see you are deeply troubled!<n>Tell this
genius what troubles you!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
No, I am not troubled. I was simply<n>running a
simulation.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
My classmates have deemed my actions<n>to be
"too much." So I am calculating<n>how to fix that.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Hm?! "Too much"?! And you're quite<n>sure that's
what they said?!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It seems their assessment is based<n>on my
training load and my everyday<n>behavior.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Then there's no problem at all! People<n>tell me I'm
too much all the time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: This just means you're a genius... just like<n>me!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
That's right! So wear that "too much"<n>label with
pride! It is proof of your<n>greatness!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
...Accessing data storage. Reclassifying<n>"too
much" as a compliment. Thank you<n>for your help.
